name: OpenAI API
description: Stores OpenAI API key settings for Pi's built-in OpenAI provider and registers OpenAI embedding models for Metidos vector search.

env.description: Fallback OpenAI API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: OpenAI API key
settings.description: OpenAI API key used for Pi's built-in OpenAI provider and embeddings. Falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY.

providers.name: OpenAI Embeddings
providers.description: Embeds text through OpenAI's embeddings API for Metidos vector search.
